note: Stage-1 CLOSED. Frozen: lr=3e-4, r=32/alpha=64, attn-only, epochs=3, train_interval=2 (round3: ti=1 no consistent gain, 1.5x cost). The one untested METHOD axis: train_on_recent (false) vs train_on_all-seen (true). Scale reduced (image_count 24->8) to keep the O(n^2) all-seen training feasible; same-scale relative comparison. Image online gain is intrinsically small at dev scale — the real magnitude is Stage-2 data scaling (image_count up), not this.
